reforms.description: Costa Rica has updated its 'Regulations for the Payments System' to allow FinTech companies to register and utilize the 'National System of Electronic Payments', managed by the central bank, to enhance competition in the financial sector.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This reform is expected to lower transaction costs and improve access to financial services, thereby fostering innovation and competition in the financial sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The Central Bank has updated its regulations to facilitate FinTech operations.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant step towards modernizing the financial sector and enhancing competition, which is crucial for economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: To foster competition in the financial sector, the Central Bank has updated its 'Regulations for the Payments System' so that FinTech companies can register with and use the 'National System of Electronic Payments'.

reforms.description: Costa Rica approved a National Strategy to Transition to a Formal Economy, aiming to reduce informality from 41% to 33% by 2025 through various high-level actions.
reforms.package_name: National Strategy to Transition to a Formal Economy
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing informality, the strategy aims to enhance productivity and increase the number of formal jobs, which can lead to higher tax revenues and improved economic stability.
reforms.status_evidence: The strategy was approved via a tripartite agreement in February 2018.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change aimed at addressing high informality rates, which is crucial for improving productivity and economic inclusion.
reforms.source_quote: A National Strategy to Transition to a Formal Economy was approved via a tripartite agreement in February 2018.

reforms.description: A bill to create the agency FOMPRODUCE has been proposed to concentrate funds and responsibilities relating to firm innovation and development in one entity, aimed at improving the effectiveness of business assistance programmes.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Consolidating resources for innovation support can enhance the effectiveness of assistance programmes, leading to improved business performance and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: A bill to create the agency has been proposed but has not progressed due to a lack of support.
reforms.importance_rationale: The proposal represents a significant step towards improving the coordination of innovation support, which could have meaningful impacts on firm-level innovation.
reforms.source_quote: A bill to create the agency FOMPRODUCE to concentrate funds and responsibilities relating to firm innovation and development in one entity has been proposed, but has not progressed due to a lack of support.

reforms.description: A productivity commission was established by Executive Decree in February 2017 to strengthen the institutional design aimed at boosting productivity and improving the business environment in Costa Rica.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The commission aims to enhance productivity, which is crucial for economic growth and competitiveness.
reforms.status_evidence: A productivity commission was established by Executive Decree.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of the productivity commission represents a significant step towards improving the institutional framework for productivity enhancement, which is vital for long-term economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: A productivity commission was established by Executive Decree in February 2017.

reforms.description: The establishment of the Presidential Council on Competitiveness and Innovation aims to institutionalize efforts to enhance productivity and innovation in Costa Rica.
reforms.package_name: Presidential Council on Competitiveness and Innovation
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By institutionalizing a focus on competitiveness and innovation, the council can drive strategic initiatives that enhance productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The bill was presented to the Legislative Assembly in April 2017, under the revision of the Commission of Economic Affairs.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of the council represents a significant step towards coordinated innovation policy, although its effectiveness will depend on implementation.
reforms.source_quote: Bill 20.331 to institutionalize the Presidential Council on Competitiveness and Innovation.

reforms.description: Costa Rica launched a National Strategy to Transition to a Formal Economy in February 2018, aiming to reduce informality by 10 percentage points by 2025. The strategy includes policies to improve education and training, enhance social protection, and simplify tax procedures.
reforms.package_name: National Strategy to Transition to a Formal Economy
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By formalizing the economy, the strategy aims to enhance productivity and access to quality jobs, which can lead to increased economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The strategy was launched in February 2018.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change aimed at reducing informality, which is a major barrier to economic growth and productivity in Costa Rica.
reforms.source_quote: The government launched a National Strategy to Transition to a Formal Economy in February 2018, with the overall goal of reducing informality by 10 percentage points.

reforms.description: Costa Rica is recommended to introduce funding mechanisms to enhance the relevance of tertiary education to the labor market, such as performance-based funding that ties a portion of funding to the number of graduates in specific fields and their employment outcomes.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Aligning education funding with labor market needs can improve the quality of graduates and enhance their employability, thereby supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: Authorities recognize the issue and proposals to reform the FEES system have been made.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform addresses a systemic issue in the education funding model, aiming to align it with economic needs, which is crucial for long-term growth and competitiveness.
reforms.source_quote: It is recommended that Costa Rica introduces funding mechanisms to enhance labour market relevance and outcomes, such as performance-based funding...

reforms.description: Costa Rica is undertaking in-depth reviews of sectors exempt from competition law, with the aim of removing unjustified exemptions that hinder competition and productivity.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Removing unjustified exemptions can enhance competition, leading to increased productivity and innovation in affected sectors.
reforms.status_evidence: Costa Rica is undertaking in-depth reviews of 25 sectors exempt from competition law.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform targets significant structural issues in the economy that affect competition and innovation, with potential wide-ranging impacts.
reforms.source_quote: Costa Rica is undertaking in-depth reviews of 25 sectors exempt from competition law between 2017 and 2020.

reforms.description: The government is working to reduce business compliance costs by establishing one-stop shops to streamline the licensing and permit system, aiming to significantly cut the time and paperwork involved in starting a business.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing the time and complexity of starting a business, this initiative is expected to enhance entrepreneurship and stimulate economic activity.
reforms.status_evidence: The government is working to reduce these business compliance costs.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant effort to improve the business environment, which could lead to increased entrepreneurship and economic dynamism.
reforms.source_quote: The government is working to reduce these business compliance costs.

reforms.description: A major overhaul of the insolvency regime is underway, aiming to unify the regulatory framework and expedite the resolution process for unviable businesses.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating the exit of unviable firms allows resources to be reallocated to more productive uses, enhancing overall economic efficiency.
reforms.status_evidence: A major overhaul of the insolvency regime is underway.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a structural change in the insolvency process, which is crucial for improving the business environment and promoting economic dynamism.
reforms.source_quote: A major overhaul of the insolvency regime is underway.

reforms.description: The Presidential Council on Competitiveness, Innovation and Human Talent (PCCI) has been established to improve policy development and coordination related to productivity and innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing policy coordination can lead to more effective innovation strategies, ultimately boosting productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The Presidential Council on Competitiveness, Innovation and Human Talent has been established.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative is significant for improving the coherence of innovation policies, which can enhance overall economic performance.
reforms.source_quote: The Presidential Council on Competitiveness, Innovation and Human Talent has been established.

reforms.description: Costa Rica's Economic Assessment recommended scaling up the PROPYME and Linkages programmes to enhance innovation and technological development in SMEs through grants and improved coordination.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing support for SMEs is expected to improve business performance, leading to increased employment and profitability.
reforms.status_evidence: The recommendation to scale up these programmes was made in the 2016 Economic Assessment.
reforms.importance_rationale: The scaling up of existing programmes represents a significant enhancement of support for SMEs, which is crucial for innovation and economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: The 2016 Economic Assessment recommended scaling up PROPYME and Linkages and improving their coordination.
